horizontal.heading: Horizontal group
horizontal.text: The group component resets (removes) margins, and border-radius to make the apperance of horizontally stacked elements.

vertical.heading: Vertical group
vertical.text: The group component resets (removes) margins, and border-radius to make the apperance of vertically stacked elements.

justify.heading: Justify items
justify.text: Align the elements within the group as you to either position

alignItems.heading: Align items
alignItems.text: Align the elements within the group vertcially in relation to each other.

alignContent.heading: Align items
alignContent.text: Align the elements within the group vertcially in relation to the group. For this to have any affect, the group must have an active flex-wrap.

flex.heading: Flex
flex.text: Changes how the container flexes its content.

wrap.heading: Wrap
wrap.text: Wrap decides how the elements will move around. Lower the viewport to see how the elements behave.

flexShrink.heading: Flex shrink
flexShrink.text: Resize the viewport to see how the elements behave
